calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jamay Lee appeared by zoom for Andrew Yan (petitioner).
Ashar Ahmed appeared by zoom for Boonrat Yan (respondent).

Both counsels agree that this settlement is in the best interest of all trust beneficiaries. Mrs. Lee stated that she has received no objections to the petition to approve the settlement. The Petition for Order Removing Trustee, etc. is off calendar. The Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

Petition For Order Removing Trustee, Appointing Interim Trustee Pending Trial, And Appointing Successor; For Surcharge And Other Relief; For Double
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Continued To Apr-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Jamay Lee, Esq., for Andrew Yan, Petitioner.
S. ASHAR AHMED, ESQ., for Boonrat Yan, Objector.

At the outset, Ms. Lee reports that the parties have reached a settlement, and the parties are working to finalize the terms of the agreement. Mr. Ahmed confirms the preceding. At the court's query, Ms. Lee advises that the parties do not intend to file a petition for the court to approve the settlement.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Apr-15-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel agrees to file a report on the settlement prior to the next calling.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition For Order Removing Trustee, Appointing Interim Trustee Pending Trial, And Appointing Successor; For Surcharge And Other Relief; For Double
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Continued To Feb-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jamay Lee appeared via zoom for Andrew Yan (petitioner).
Ashar Ahmed appeared via zoom for and with Boonrat Yan (objector).

Ms. Lee stated that the property should be transferred back to the trust and order to confirm that assets. Mr. Ahmed stated that there is no lien on the property, and they plan on settling the case. Order of status hearing is taken off calendar. First amended petition for order removing trustee etc., is continued to February 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Wan: Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Removing Trustee, Appointing Interim Trustee Pending Trial, And Appointing Successor; For Surcharge And Other Relief; For Double
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Continued To Dec-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Jamay Lee, Esq. for Andrew Yan, Petitioner;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Ms. Lee stated that she had spoken with Ms. Yan's counsel, that they talked about a resolution, that they understand that the property needs to go back into the trust, that the home is not in a livable condition, and that she is requesting that this Court consider appointing her client as trustee since Boonrat Yan is in Thailand. The Court and counsel confer about Ms. Yan's requests that the property go back into the trust, that Boonrat Yan be suspended, and that her client be appointed as trustee.

At the conclusion of discussions, the Court suspended Boonrat Yan as trustee and appointed Andrew Yan as the temporary successor trustee. Ms. Lee is to prepare the order and submit it to the Court.

In addition, an Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Trustee Boonrat Yan and her Attorney Ashar Ahmed to appear on December 11, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear. The pending Petition for Order Removing Trustee, Appointing Interim Trustee Pending Trial, and Appointing Successor; for Surcharge and Other Relief is also continued to that date. The Court stated that it will set a briefing schedule which will be set forth in the Order to Show Cause.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: R. Cabrera. Matter not reported.

Petition For Order Removing Trustee, Appointing Interim Trustee Pending Trial, And Appointing Successor; For Surcharge And Other Relief; For Double
Off Calendar Sep-25-2023 Continued To Oct-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Jamay Lee, Esq. for Andrew J. Yan, Petitioner;
Ashar Ahmed, Esq. for Boonrat Yan, Respondent.

Mr. Ahmed stated that his client is in Thailand and that he sent an email to counsel last week so that the parties could set a time to talk settlement. The Court briefly addressed the issue of whether there are any other assets belonging to the bypass trust, noted that there is the option for the parties to particpate in pro bono mediation if the assets are $3,000,000.00 or less, and stated that it would grant the parties a 30-day continuance. Ms. Lee requested that the Court grant the continuance to allow the parties time to discuss settlement.

The mater is continued to October 25, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 for status on meet and confer/settlement efforts or a referral to pro bono mediation.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Singh. Matter not reported.
